# Ronit Raj

> Full-Stack AI & ML Engineer and Open Source Maintainer — I build production AI end-to-end, from training and serving models (GRPO on AMD MI300X, InferenceGym LLM serving) to full-stack apps and on-chain systems.

Ronit Raj is a full-stack AI & ML engineer and Core Maintainer of GitMesh (Linux Foundation Decentralized Trust lab, 140+ GitHub stars). He speaks at Open Source Summit India 2026 (Linux Foundation, Mumbai). Featured work includes NHA × IISc PM-JAY Top 3 Runner-Up claim adjudication (Gemma 3 12B, +3.4 clinical F1), ClauseMark verified regulatory evidence for the UN Digital Trade hackathon, PARAM blockchain credentials (6-department pilot), InferenceGym OpenEnv RL for LLM serving, and Smart India Hackathon 2024 Winner (SHAKTI). 9× hackathon podiums, $5,000+ in prizes. Patent pending (multi-modal surveillance, App No. 202521020743).

## Key facts
- Role: Full-Stack AI & ML Engineer · Core Maintainer @ GitMesh (LFDT)
- Location: India
- Education: B.Tech Mathematics & Scientific Computing, IIIT Gwalior (2023–2027), CGPA 8.35
- Credentials: Patent Pending · SIH 2024 Winner · NHA PM-JAY Top 3 Runner-Up · OSS India 2026 Speaker · GitMesh 140+★
- Focus: LLM fine-tuning (GRPO/LoRA), RAG, AI infrastructure & LLM serving, MCP agent governance, full-stack AI apps
- Site: https://roniii.vercel.app

## Featured projects
- [GitMesh](https://github.com/LF-Decentralized-Trust-labs/gitmesh) - Policy-as-Code engine for open-source AI-agent orchestration. LFDT lab project (140+★, 48 forks); OPA/Rego, MCP, ACP (JSON-RPC 2.0), Phase Two TypeScript monorepo, OpenSSF certification. Core Maintainer. (TypeScript, MCP, OPA, PostgreSQL)
- [PM-JAY Claim Adjudication](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/pmjay-adjudication) - Automated STG compliance for Ayushman Bharat. NHA × IISc Top 3 Runner-Up (₹3L); dual-cached Gemma 3 12B + keyword fusion raised clinical F1 0.7567 → 0.7909 (+3.4 pts). (Gemma 3 12B, Python, Pydantic, OpenCV)
- [ClauseMark](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/regulatory-intelligence-engine) - Verified Regulatory Evidence Engine for UN Digital Trade (RDTII). 15-package hexagonal monorepo; LangGraph + BGE-M3/Qdrant hybrid retrieval + 4-gate verification; zero-hallucination span-ID citations, HITL Postgres checkpointer. (Python, LangGraph, Qdrant, FastAPI, Docling)
- [PARAM](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/param) - Blockchain academic-credential platform for ABV-IIITM Gwalior. Live pilot across 6 departments and 6 degree programs; Next.js 16 + Express 5, Privy, 5-role RBAC, 37 Prisma models, 100+ automated tests, ERC-721 on Base Sepolia. (Next.js 16, Express 5, Prisma, Solidity, BullMQ)
- [InferenceGym](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/inferencegym) - OpenEnv RL environment for LLM inference serving (batching, KV-cache, speculative decoding). PPO policy beats vLLM-style heuristics 0.55 vs 0.30 on static workloads. Meta × PyTorch × Hugging Face hackathon. (Python, PyTorch, PPO, OpenEnv, FastAPI)
- [iONIA Platform](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/ionia) - AI-powered competitive-exam prep; NTA-replica interface, 1,360+ question bank, FastAPI OCR, 3-tier RBAC; CrftHQ cohort. (Next.js, Express, FastAPI, MongoDB)
- [SHAKTI](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/shakti) - Vision-Language RAG for military intelligence. SIH 2024 Winner; offline mPLUG-Owl3 fine-tune with strong VQA/OCR benchmarks. (PyTorch, RAG, FastAPI)
- [GeneTrust AI Studio](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/genetrust) - AI CRISPR intelligence platform; HackHazards '25 Winner (1st of 800+ projects). (PyTorch, DNABERT, RAG)
- [ZeroKeyCLI](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/zerokey) - x402 micropayment "AdSense for the terminal" on Monad; Monad Blitz 4th place. (Node.js, Solidity, x402)
- [LegalEase](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/legalease) - AI legal-compliance automation; Trillion Dollar GenAI 2nd place ($400). (Next.js, FastAPI, LangChain)

## Patent
- A Multi-Modal Surveillance System (Pending) - Co-Author. Indian Patent Application No. 202521020743, filed Mar 2025 (SSR Ref. 402645). ViT (400M params) + NLP (1.7B params) for real-time traffic analysis; 92/100 on COCO/BDD100K; edge-deployed ~2-hour battery on consumer hardware.

## Experience
- Core Maintainer @ GitMesh (Jul 2025 – Present) - LFDT multi-agent orchestration runtime; OPA policy-as-code + MCP; 140+ stars, 20 contributors, OpenSSF certification, ACP orchestrator, Postgres audit log.
- Software Engineer Intern @ C3iHub, IIT Kanpur (May 2025 – Aug 2025) - PARAM blockchain credential platform; pilot across 6 departments / 6 degree programs; Next.js 16 + Express 5, Privy, 5-role RBAC, 37-model Postgres schema, 100+ automated tests.
- Founding Engineer @ Garudex Labs (Nov 2024 – Jun 2025) - TRAFFIC real-time edge system (patent + AICTE IDE 2025 Best Startup Pitch); 15-agent AI SaaS backend with exponential-backoff retries.
- Full-Stack Developer @ Ionia (Dec 2024 – Jun 2025) - Online exam-prep platform (project: iONIA).

## Skills
- AI/ML: PyTorch, Transformers, RAG, Reinforcement Learning (PPO, GRPO), LoRA, PEFT, LangChain, LangGraph, Vision-Language Models, vLLM
- AI Infra: Hugging Face, Docker, Kubernetes (CRD/Helm), MCP, AWS, GCP, CI/CD
- Python: FastAPI, Pydantic, OpenCV
- Web: Next.js, React, Node.js, Express, TypeScript
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Qdrant, Pinecone, Prisma
- Blockchain: Solidity, Foundry, Base
- Languages: C++, Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL
